sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Jet Pack
special_mechanics.description: Duck Dodgers can fly around to avoid ground danger and reach new locations

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Recoil
special_mechanics.description: Duck Dodgers bounces backwards whenever firing any weapon

special_mechanics.name: Nutty Special Attack
special_mechanics.description: Duck Dodgers whirls around and destroys every enemy on screen

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Reviews note jump control issues in SNES version (EGM: 'jumps being particularly troublesome'). Game Boy version received praise for 'excellent controls'. No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Daffy Duck: The Marvin Missions
